policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-adb-w10 - Automated private link DNS integration'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Databricks#IncidentremediationDatabricks#drcp-adb-w10 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP Azure Databricks should use secondary layer of infrastructure encryption for DBFS
policyDefinition.description: The DBFS root file system must have a secondary layer of encryption with platform managed keys for data at rest.

drcp.name: DatabricksInfrastructureEncryptionMustBeEnabled
drcp.controlDesc: Disable DBFS file browser in non-Dev environment

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
